name: bi-read-translator
description: A bilingual English/Simplified Chinese reading translator WebExtension for Chrome and Safari.

scripts.package:chrome: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../outputs/bi-read-translator-chrome.zip .
scripts.convert:safari: npm run build && xcrun safari-web-extension-converter dist --project-location safari --app-name BiReadTranslator --bundle-identifier com.codex.bireadtranslator

author: Codex
